aboutPage.heroTitle: A Story That Began with Fire
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: From the heart of Iran to Doha, a flavor passed down through generations
aboutPage.storyP1: Kabab Dagh Nan Dagh Restaurant was born in 2018 from a simple dream: to bring authentic and traditional Iranian flavor to Qatar. Every skewer, every fresh bread, every stew is the result of recipes passed down through generations of Iranian families.
aboutPage.storyP2: Today, in the heart of Doha, we combine the spirit of Iranian hospitality with uncompromising quality, making every meal a memory.
aboutPage.value1Desc: Fresh meat and vegetables from the best local suppliers daily
aboutPage.value2Desc: Faithful to traditional Iranian flavors, with no shortcuts
aboutPage.value3Desc: Our kebabs are slowly grilled over real charcoal
aboutPage.ctaTitle: Ready to experience the real taste?

reviews.title: Customer Reviews
reviews.subtitle: Real experiences from those who have tasted our food
reviews.r1text: The best Iranian kebab I've had in Doha. Warm and welcoming atmosphere.
reviews.r2text: The food quality is amazing, just like authentic Iranian home cooking.
reviews.r3text: Fast service, authentic taste, reasonable prices. I will definitely come back.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to your common questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our restaurant, menu and services
faq.a1: We are open daily from 11 AM to 12 AM midnight.
faq.a2: Yes, you can order through Snoonu, Talabat, and Keeta.
faq.a3: Yes, we have several vegetarian appetizers like Hummus and Shirazi Salad.
faq.q4: How can I reserve a table?
faq.a4: Call the restaurant directly or send a message via the Contact Us page.

videoGallery.title: A Cinematic Experience of Our Catering Service
videoGallery.subtitle: A deep look into our service delivery, equipment and special party moments

main.title: Experience a Royal BBQ at Your Home
main.desc: Our professional team comes to your home with full equipment to serve fresh, hot kebab in front of your guests. Create a unique and memorable night!

tour.title: Equipment and Mobile Setup
tour.desc: A look at our professional mobile kitchen setup that provides the best service with minimal intrusion into your space.

kabab.title: Master Kebab in Your Presence
kabab.desc: Watch the art of grilling with charcoal and pure smoky aroma, right in your yard or reception hall. The excitement of a professional kitchen in your home!

moments.title: Special and Memorable Parties
moments.desc: Parties, birthdays and corporate events that became a unique and memorable night with our home kebab catering service.

chef.title: Head Chef and Expert Team
chef.desc: Meet our head chefs and support team who come to your home in uniform with full hygiene standards.

catering.title: Hot Kebab at Your Home
catering.desc: Whether your party is at home, garden or cinema, we deliver and serve royal hot kebab with VIP service.
